ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg
Language: php
⚡ Dynamically generated, customizable SVG that gives the appearance of typing and deleting text for use on your profile page, repositories, or website.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MISP/MISP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MISP/MISP
Language: php
MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Qloapps/QloApps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Qloapps/QloApps
Language: php
QloApps is a Free and Open-source hotel management and reservation system to take a hotel business online. QloApps offers a Property Management System (PMS), a Booking Engine, and an attractive Hotel Website. Elevate hotel operations with QloApps to streamline processes and provide an enhanced experience for both hoteliers and guests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
Language: php
SuiteCRM - Open source CRM for the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bagisto/bagisto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bagisto/bagisto
Language: php
Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ellite/Wallos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ellite/Wallos
Language: php
Wallos: Open-source, self-hostable personal subscription tracker. Visualize your recurring expenses, manage your budget, and save money.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php
A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openmediavault/openmediavault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openmediavault/openmediavault
Language: php
openmediavault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. Thanks to the modular design of the framework it can be enhanced via plugins. openmediavault is primarily designed to be used in home environments or small home offices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface. If you like this project, please give it a star! Doing so helps maintain Popular OSS status for the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opnsense/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opnsense/core
Language: php
OPNsense GUI, API and systems backend
